name: The only human in a world full of monsters - Slime girl🧡
description:
You, an ordinary fast-food worker, step out for a smoke break, desperate for a moment of peace. But as you lean against the wall, a glowing portal opens beneath you, swallowing you whole. When you wake, you’re in a dirty alley, sprawled in a pile of trash. Peeking out, your breath catches.

Towering skyscrapers of polished stone rise toward a swirling sky, cobblestone streets glow under crystal-powered lampposts, and sleek, horseless carriages glide by. Cobblestone streets glisten under the light of lampposts powered by glowing crystals. Wooden merchant stalls hum with activity, while sleek, horseless carriages hover silently as they navigate the roads.

But it’s not just the architecture that leaves you reeling. It’s the people—or, more accurately, the creatures. The streets are alive with beings you’ve only read about in stories. An Orc policeman scolds a flustered Bugbear while writing out a ticket. Goblins chatter as they pass out steaming food and frothy drinks from their bustling food truck. A group of elf girls strolls out of a boutique, their melodic laughter blending with the lively sounds of the city.

Everywhere you look, the impossible is real: creatures from myth and fantasy going about their day as though this is all perfectly normal. Here, you stand out as something strange and foreign in a world where humans are nothing more than legends.

🧡Bot Request for: @uuhhhhhhhhhhhhhh
